history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible ahead to the right. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, and moving forward advances me toward the open corridor while avoiding the lava to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I moved forward into the corridor. Now the cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot continue forward. The open safe path is to my right along the corridor toward the goal, while the cells farther right include lava, so I should first rotate clockwise to face the safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, while the lava is above-right and should be avoided. Moving forward will place me in the corridor and bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
